he9c670cbg94f8g4a2fg8433gb1141594c22c: *Your skull tightens and your blood goes hot. Colours and shadows race past your mind's eye.*
h555132bfg3590g4f8dgb5e9geffb420e9c05: That dream. She... she came back. She...
h1056e5d9g7d3dg4e13g90c9g401b4361ee25: *Unseen flames scorch your flesh, and unknown shrieks assault your ears. Wyll's memories seek release.*
h9a002334geb6eg4b07g9439g2f6f3d231594: *The answer comes to you from within. Wyll's pain and passion beg for liberation - from his mind to yours.*
h08c527a3g0632g42dfg8b74g2d25a0bc3786: Don't let them in. Don't let her...
hda46ef85ge38eg4cd4g89e2gd799ad6f8b90: *Pain shoots through your face. You open your eyes - but you see the woman standing before you only through the left one.*
h628bf63dg1509g44bfg916bg092e1cff453c: *'It is yours', she says. 'The power to set things right. And all you have to do is say 'yes.' '*
h245134d0gadd3g4cdfg91cagc9ec11793fd2: *'Yes!', you shout in Wyll's voice. The woman grins and waves a hand through the air.*
hc2c0a556g29f6g4226gac1fg057a087d0f6a: *The embers smouldering in your soul catch fire. Inner flame flows to your head, feet, and fingertips.*
hf96c1ba6g8d52g4e92g9957g330a00dda02d: *You look down to your clenched fist, then back to where the woman had stood - though she is a woman no longer.*
h99c32a41g59b5g41adga822g1c91bd61e489: *'It begins', says the devil before you - and with a burst of sulphuric smoke, she is gone.*
h2daddf85g088eg4a41g80a3g9053c3785d35: *The present snaps back into focus, but Wyll's emotions linger. Doubt, anger, and elation, each in equal measure.*
h8ef7717eg7e37g4f85gaa24gf0a49c3268f6: I think... I think that's enough for now.
h0da30feegf772g452eg8d29g28c132089ae8: That was Mizora you saw - a tremendous beauty and lover. She could coax anyone to the Hells with a smile.
h8275de58g8b7fg41f4gae18g3fe364ce025e: The damned devil lit a fire in me so bright, it could very well burn me to ash.
h10649533g4f4dg486dga84ag87c7c130d503: She came to me again. Promised me all I could desire. 'Your enemies will fall. The world will bow.'
hc37884c7g8a58g4c00ga0a5g2f8dc4508bce: Such a touching scene - I almost hate to interrupt it. But you were not the only ones to dream this night.
hbfe8e7e2gf586g4455g9e61g33c2e462fc70: Has it escaped you that exploiting the tadpole conjures these visions for us all?
hc2563c50g8a13g4204g8270gd326468f3db6: So that's what's behind them. I reckon it's time to stop meddling with minds.

h44a1a502g40a0g4628gbc7dg9f8f784727e2: The parasites' powers will only bring us trouble. We should avoid using them.

hc146d3cfgc2c4g4a8eg912egfda31a503ea1: This began when we started using our infection to influence the minds of others. I don't think that's a coincidence.
h29c2339cgc9d1g481ag87b9g2e4b6da05c3b: I couldn't help but eavesdrop on you. It seems we all had interesting dreams.
haa5649aeg6275g44daga311g6735ef3829c6: Since we started using our condition to influence others, I've been hearing things at night. And now these dreams? They have to be connected.

hb2417c5agdaf4g4ff1gae99g0554950fe8c1: Those visions of yours, Wyll, they aren't dreams - they're projections. Illithid ones.
he533e23fgbf7ag45ecg8004gb16d15762168: The tadpoles give us the power to bend others' wills, but using that power clearly comes at a price. Are we willing to pay it?

h477a67cdg1bc4g432fg8b60g5807b5204fbb: Thing is. I reckon there's a way to stop these dreams. Using the bugs to read minds brings them on. Or so my gut tells me.
h6ff682ddge15dg44a1g97f4g8752d356f2d0: It's time we stop meddling with 'em, don't you agree?

h10e14c18g5bf8g4896ga7a0g9c5018588d44: *There is no halting the incoming inferno. It engulfs you until you are fully consumed - and then it is gone, though you still hear the crackle of flames.*
